resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def lexicalOrder(self, word: str, numFriends: int) -> str:
        from itertools import permutations
        perms = [''.join(p) for p in permutations(word, numFriends)]
        return max(perms)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n!)
space complexity: O(n!)
energy implications: HIGH
explanation: This solution uses the permutations function from the itertools module to generate all possible splits of the word into numFriends non-empty strings. It then returns the lexicographically largest string from the generated permutations.
